notes.body: Upload the 6/30 deposit receipt to the portal ASAP.

FGU Bonus Effect — sign the attached form and email it back to Crystal or Andrew. Standing: Power of One — Ops Manual is single source of truth; develop two future GMs/year, min six Shift Leaders; Halo Effect + Suggestive Selling; 100% shops attainable. June/July budgets at the bottom of the 2065 sheet, DoorDash + UberEats promos baked in.

All-Market Call — Teams meeting invite in the inbox; watch for the time and join. Standing KPI Ranking — 60% of score = Secret Shop + Customer complaints + Ticket times. Any outside vendor call still needs a hub ticket for tracking + warranty.
July 4 bread addition made today's (7/3) truck. BOSS updated to 20 HB / 2 HD for Friday. Covered for the weekend.
New hire Megan Kurschner processed and good to schedule. In directory as PHONE PENDING — need her phone to complete the row.
